title: Reports and Publications – Science and Research - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and Publications – Science and Research
In this section, you'll find Health Canada reports and publications related to its science and research activities. These documents include Health Policy Research bulletins and working papers, proceedings from Health Canada's Health Science Forum and Science Advisory Board meetings, as well as results of specific research projects.
The resources have been grouped within the following categories:
- Health Policy Research
- Science Advice and Decision Making Research Ethics Board Science Advisory Board Task Force on Scientific Risk Assessment
- Research Ethics Board
- Science Advisory Board Task Force on Scientific Risk Assessment
- Task Force on Scientific Risk Assessment
- Science Publications

## Additional Resources
- Driving Health Canada’s Science and Research Excellence - Impact report 2024
